title: Living in Boulder vlong 12 - 16 - 2017: Google Earthing Roman Temples in region 5

enrichment.summary: Kyle is up at 3:46 AM working on a Google Earth project reconstructing ancient Rome, placing buildings region by region using historical data on the number of houses, apartments, shrines, and other structures. He describes researching Roman building counts per region (region 1, region 5), referencing floor plans of Roman domus houses, and figuring out heights and colors for insulae (apartment blocks) in his digital map.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: genuinely excited and deeply invested, working through the night to get it right
methodical approach, using source data on building counts per region to drive the map
